name: Zen Mountain Monastery
description: Zen Mountain Monastery is the main house of the Mountains and Rivers Order, located on 230 acres in Mount Tremper, New York, in the Catskill Mountains. Founded by John Daido Loori Roshi in 1980, the monastery offers residential training, retreats, and the arts and Zen programs. It combines rigorous Zen training with artistic practice and environmental stewardship.
